title: Player Logger
description: A plugin to log information about your player such as join & leave location (in-game) and many more with MySQL and SQLite Database support.
body:
![player logger plugin, spigot server plugins, logger plugin, minecraft logging plugin, spigot logging plugin, server plugins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ed1f407f1b0d82c69a0e96561c1ce2f6ec68ec.png)

[![custom plugin minecraft cheap server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6c16ae3b5b21370f4c93226f642777807e2410c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/U6BjjKzvpE)



<details>
<summary>Additional Details</summary>

# Plugin Information
Player Logger is a spigot plugin to track and log player activity for security reasons and debugging of issues. Player Logger logs player activity such as messages, commands, In-Game Location (Co-ordinates) of player and IP Addresses. Every check can be disabled in the configurations based on the server admin's needs.

# Features

* IP Address Logging
* MySQL/SQLite Database Support
* Light Weight 
* First Join Location Logging
* Last Join Location Logging
* Free and [Open Source](https://github.com/LuminaGames/PlayerLogger)

Player Logger is a product of [Lumina Games](https://discord.gg/e97HsSX89j)

</details>
